facebook.caption: 4.5 stars. 567 reviews. One bowl of pho. Pho Sai Gon on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 keeps showing up on locals' lists for a reason. No frills, no tourist markup. Just broth that earns its reputation review after review. If you're in Khu 1 and need a real meal, this is the address. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the bowl land on the table. Steam rising, broth clear, herbs piled high. This is what 567 reviewers kept coming back for at Pho Sai Gon. Real pho in Phu Quoc.
